extraction.one_line_summary: LUTSENKO Alexey caught GRELLI Fabian with 100 meters remaining after the Direct Energie rider solo'd 144km including most of Jebel Akhdar
tactical_patterns: Direct Energie placed two riders in early break then rode prolonged solo summit finish attempt, nearly stealing from favorites
Astana controlled peloton tempo entire stage despite two Direct Energie escapees, suggesting confidence in Lutsenko's uphill sprint finish
AG2R Puma exhausted domestiques early on Green Mountain climb, leaving protected rider without support for final kilometer

rider_signals.LUTSENKO Alexey: positive: Won from heavily controlled peloton while Astana set tempo all day, indicating exceptional form with three stage wins
rider_signals.GRELLI Fabian: positive: Nearly held 144km solo effort through entire Jebel Akhdar ascent, cracking only final 100m despite Direct Energie gamble
rider_signals.SEVILLA Oscar: negative: Distanced from red jersey group on Green Mountain despite being race leader, lost jersey by gaps opening late
